handshake-with-cursor-and-token.description: A handshake presenting every optional field: sessionId, a resume cursor, and an opaque authToken.

handshake-without-cursor.description: A minimal fresh-connection handshake carrying only the required protocolVersion.

frame-envelope.description: An outbound envelope wrapping a well-formed inner session event frame.

pong.description: The answer to a heartbeat probe.

unknown-kind.description: A structurally valid JSON object whose kind discriminator is not part of the wire vocabulary.

frame-with-garbage-inner.description: A frame envelope whose inner frame payload is garbage; the transport's parser never validates the inner frame (that is the host-session binding's responsibility), so this still parses as kind "frame".

handshake-rejections.description: Parameters for the four handshake rejection paths: an unsupported protocolVersion literal and a sessionId that does not match the bound session.

policy-closures.description: Parameters for the liveness (heartbeat) and bounded-backpressure connection-level closures.
